pneumonia.description: Pneumonia is an infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs.

malaria.description: Malaria is a mosquito-borne disease caused by a parasite.

food_poisoning.description: Food poisoning is an illness caused by eating contaminated food.

migraine.description: Migraine is a neurological condition often causing intense headaches and sensitivity to light or sound.

dengue.description: Dengue is a viral infection transmitted by mosquitoes.

common_cold.description: The common cold is a viral infection of your nose and throat.

typhoid.description: Typhoid is a bacterial infection caused by Salmonella typhi.

covid-19.description: COVID-19 is a respiratory illness caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

flu.description: The flu is a contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.

gastritis.description: Gastritis is the inflammation of the stomach lining.
